languages.original_text: {n}A faint smile plays on Eogunn's lips.{/n} "Declined with gratitude and due reverence. The tech-unit Nuncius is designated as a personal instrument of the quest for the divine, which confers the privilege of privacy. That includes privacy from intrusion by entities of equal standing."

languages.text: {n}На губах Эоганна играет слабая улыбка.{/n} "Отклонено с благодарностью и почтением. На техноединицу Нунциус распространен статус личного инструментария богоискания, подразумевающая привилегию приватности. В том числе от вторжения равных в статусе духовных лиц".

{n}A faint smile plays on Eogunn's lips.{/n} "Declined with gratitude and due reverence. The tech-unit Nuncius is designated as a personal instrument of the quest for the divine, which confers the privilege of privacy. That includes privacy from intrusion by entities of equal standing."
languages.original_text: {n}На губах Эоганна играет слабая улыбка.{/n} "Отклонено с благодарностью и почтением. На техноединицу Нунциус распространен статус личного инструментария богоискания, подразумевающая привилегию приватности. В том числе от вторжения равных в статусе духовных лиц".

traits.locale_text: {n}A faint smile plays on Eogunn's lips.{/n} "Declined with gratitude and due reverence. The tech-unit Nuncius is designated as a personal instrument of the quest for the divine, which confers the privilege of privacy. That includes privacy from intrusion by entities of equal standing among the Ecclesiarchy."

{n}A faint smile plays on Eo-gann's lips.{/n} "Tech-unit Nuncius gratefully and respectfully declines the request. He asks that it be recorded that to him has been extended the status of seeker of genetic and technological mysteries, which confers the privilege of privacy. That includes privacy from intrusion by entities of equal status."

{n}A faint smile plays on Eo-gann's lips.{/n} "Tech-unit Nuncius gratefully and respectfully declines the request. He asks that it be recorded that to him has been extended the status of seeker of genetic and technological mysteries, which confers the privilege of privacy. That includes privacy from intrusion by entities of equal status."

The tech-unit Nuncius is designated as a personal instrument of the quest for the divine, which confers the privilege of privacy. That includes privacy from intrusion by entities of equal standing among the Ecclesiarchy."

The tech-unit Nuncius is designated as a personal instrument of the quest for the divine, which confers the privilege of privacy. That includes privacy from intrusion by entities of equal standing among the Ecclesiarchy."

{n}A faint smile plays on Eogunn's lips.{/n} "Declined with gratitude and due reverence. The tech-unit Nuncius is designated as a personal instrument of the quest for the divine, which confers the privilege of privacy. That includes privacy from intrusion by entities of equal standing."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは薄く微笑む。{/n}「テクニカルユニット・ヌンシウスは感謝と敬意を込めて、その依頼を辞退いたします。ヌンシウスは、遺伝子とテクノロジーの謎を探る者としての地位を授けられ、その特権であるプライバシーを享受することを記録いたします。それは、同等の地位を持つ存在からの侵入から得られるプライバシーです」
languages.original_text: {n}A faint smile plays on Eogunn's lips.{/n} "Tech-unit Nuncius gratefully and respectfully declines the request. He asks that it be recorded that to him has been extended the status of seeker of genetic and technological mysteries, which confers the privilege of privacy. That includes privacy from intrusion by entities of equal status."

languages.text: {n}Ein schwaches Lächeln umspielt Eogunns Lippen.{/n} "Dankend und mit allem gebotenen Respekt abgelehnt. Die Tech-Einheit Nuncius dient als persönliches Werkzeug auf der Suche nach dem Göttlichen, die das Privileg der Privatheit einschließt. Dies gilt auch für Eingriffe von Wesenheiten mit vergleichbarem Status."
languages.original_text: {n}A faint smile plays on Eogunn's lips.{/n} "Declined with gratitude and due reverence. The tech-unit Nuncius is designated as a personal instrument of the quest for the divine, which confers the privilege of privacy. That includes privacy from intrusion by entities of equal standing."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein schwaches Lächeln umspielt Eogunns Lippen.{/n} "Dankend und mit allem gebotenen Respekt abgelehnt. Die Tech-Einheit Nuncius dient als persönliches Werkzeug auf der Suche nach dem Göttlichen, die das Privileg der Privatheit einschließt. Dies gilt auch für Eingriffe von Wesenheiten mit vergleichbarem Status."

languages.text: {n}Una breve sonrisa cruza el rostro de Eogunn.{/n} «La solicitud queda declinada con el debido respeto y agradecimiento. La tecnounidad Nuncius ha sido designada como instrumento personal en la búsqueda de lo divino, lo que le otorga el privilegio de la privacidad, incluso ante la intrusión de otras entidades de igual rango».
languages.original_text: {n}A faint smile plays on Eogunn's lips.{/n} "Declined with gratitude and due reverence. The tech-unit Nuncius is designated as a personal instrument of the quest for the divine, which confers the privilege of privacy. That includes privacy from intrusion by entities of equal standing."

traits.locale_text: {n}Una breve sonrisa cruza el rostro de Eogunn.{/n} «La solicitud queda declinada con el debido respeto y agradecimiento. La tecnounidad Nuncius ha sido designada como instrumento personal en la búsqueda de lo divino, lo que le otorga el privilegio de la privacidad, incluso ante la intrusión de otras entidades de igual rango».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un dudaklarında hafif bir gülümseme beliriyor.{/n} "Minnettarlıkla gereken saygıyla reddedildi. Nuncius tekno birimi, ilahi olanı arayışın kişisel bir aracı olarak tanımlanmıştır. Bu da ona gizlilik ayrıcalığı tanır. Buna mevkice denk sayılabilecek kimselerin müdahalesinden korunma gizliliği de dâhildir."
languages.original_text: {n}A faint smile plays on Eogunn's lips.{/n} "Declined with gratitude and due reverence. The tech-unit Nuncius is designated as a personal instrument of the quest for the divine, which confers the privilege of privacy. That includes privacy from intrusion by entities of equal standing."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn'un dudaklarında hafif bir gülümseme beliriyor.{/n} "Minnettarlıkla gereken saygıyla reddedildi. Nuncius tekno birimi, ilahi olanı arayışın kişisel bir aracı olarak tanımlanmıştır. Bu da ona gizlilik ayrıcalığı tanır. Buna mevkice denk sayılabilecek kimselerin müdahalesinden korunma gizliliği de dâhildir."

languages.text: {n}Un léger sourire se dessine sur les lèvres d'Eogunn.{/n} « Votre demande est refusée avec toute la gratitude et le respect qui vous sont dus. La techno-unité Nuncius s'est vu accorder le statut d'instrument personnel dans le domaine de l'étude du divin, ce qui lui confère le privilège de la vie privée, et donc une protection contre toute intrusion de la part d'entités de statut égal. »
languages.original_text: {n}A faint smile plays on Eogunn's lips.{/n} "Declined with gratitude and due reverence. The tech-unit Nuncius is designated as a personal instrument of the quest for the divine, which confers the privilege of privacy. That includes privacy from intrusion by entities of equal standing."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un léger sourire se dessine sur les lèvres d'Eogunn.{/n} « Votre demande est refusée avec toute la gratitude et le respect qui vous sont dus. La techno-unité Nuncius s'est vu accorder le statut d'instrument personnel dans le domaine de l'étude du divin, ce qui lui confère le privilège de la vie privée, et donc une protection contre toute intrusion de la part d'entités de statut égal. »

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡的嘴角泛起一丝浅笑。{/n}“我很感激，并致以应有的敬意，但恕我婉拒。技术单位努恩修斯被指定为追寻神性之个人工具，此身份赋予其隐私之特权，其中亦包括免受同等地位实体侵扰之隐私权。”
